value.found_quote: Your server emits `notifications/claude/channel` with two params: ... `content` ... The event body. Delivered as the body of the `<channel>` tag.
value.rationale: The page describes channels as MCP servers that emit `notifications/claude/channel` events, with content delivered into Claude's context wrapped in a `<channel>` tag. It explicitly states channels are in research preview. This directly substantiates the claim.
